' 3. 4. 5. 6. 7. 8. ~aiRT'ejrM! *i*fli<i> ^T.crTT.f^r. 385(3?) mcr5T.R.24(3T) ^TT.cf5T.f>.914(3T) ^Tf.^T.R.506(3l) ^T.cr5T.R.680(3T) mcfjT:R.796(3j) m^T.R.430(3T) ^TT. cm.ft. 485(3?) . dlflВ« 04.06.2009 11.01.2010 15.11.2010 05.07.2011 14.09.2011 04.11.2011 05.06.2011 21.06.2012 MINISTRY OF CORPORATE AFFAIRS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 14th September, 2012 GS.R 692(E).вЂ” In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (2) of section 79 of the Limited Liability Partnership Act, 2008 (6 of 2009), the Central Government hereby makes the following rules, further to amend the Limited Liability Partnership Rules, 2009 namely:- 1. (1) These rules may be called the Limited Liability Partnership (Second Amendment) Rules, 2012. (2) They shall come into force with effect from 16th September, 2012. 2. In the Limited Liability Partnership Rules, 2009, in LLP Form No. 11, in the serial number 12, for item (vii), the following item shall be substituted, namely:- "(vii) Companies Incorporated outside India or Companies registered in Sikkim ^ ^ ] [F.
